# Tatham Tech

> Senior contract developer, AI-accelerated. Jessica Tatham offers staff augmentation and solution architecture for engineering teams, plus AI-integrated custom websites for small business. A decade of production work at Bell Canada, Wells Fargo, and SAP. Based on the US East Coast.

## About

Tatham Tech is run by Jessica Tatham, a senior contract developer and solution architect with over a decade of production experience. Her work is AI-accelerated: most code is produced with Claude with senior verification, which means production-quality code shipped at higher velocity than traditional development.

Jessica has worked at Bell Canada, Wells Fargo, Sofar Sounds, and Taulia (acquired by SAP). She is based on the US East Coast and works US business hours.

Tatham Tech serves two primary audiences:
- **Engineering teams**: Senior contract development, staff augmentation, solution architecture, and frontend technical leadership for scale-ups and enterprise teams.
- **Small business clients**: AI-integrated custom websites, website redesigns, and AI workflow automation when the project fits.

## Services

### For engineering teams
- Senior contract development, AI-accelerated
- Solution architecture and system design
- Frontend technical leadership
- Staff augmentation, contract-to-hire, or project-based engagements
- CMS and platform builds

### For small business
- AI-integrated custom website design and development
- Website redesign and modernization
- AI workflow automation
- Digital strategy sessions
- Monthly retainer support

## Portfolio

### Enterprise work
- **Bell Canada**: Solution architect on a bilingual corporate communications platform. Next.js, Contentstack, AWS.
- **Wells Fargo**: Frontend tech lead across multiple React projects. Promoted from contractor to tech lead within one year.
- **Sofar Sounds**: Senior engineer and tech lead for ecommerce and event management platforms.
- **Taulia (SAP)**: Software engineer on supply chain finance software.

### Small business work
La Rue PR, Miscarriage Movement, The Mother Chapter, Chris Ryan Fitness, Notion Consulting, Charell Star, Steve Chiger, Design Bureaux, Transactis, and others.

## Blog

Tatham Tech publishes practical articles on contract development, AI-accelerated workflows, custom website pricing, hiring freelance developers, and AI for small business. Topics cluster into three categories:

- **AI for Business**: AI automation, time savings, getting started with AI
- **Web Development**: website costs, redesigns, tech stacks, hiring developers, SEO
- **Behind the Scenes**: how AI is used in modern web development, contract dev career insights

## Author

Jessica Tatham. Senior contract developer and solution architect. Decade of production experience at Bell Canada, Wells Fargo, SAP, and Sofar Sounds. AI-accelerated workflow with senior verification.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jessica-tatham-00725943/
- Contact: https://tathamtech.com/contact
